# Release v1.3.0

## English

### Security Hardening

- 🔒 **Webview attachment validation** - The main process now validates webview attachment requests and blocks navigation to non-Steam pages.
- 🛡️ **Shared URL allow-list** - The Steam URL allow-list is now shared between the renderer and the main process, removing duplicated maintenance.
- 🔐 **Tokens no longer returned in plaintext** - GitHub tokens are no longer returned to the renderer as plaintext; renderer config only receives token presence and masked preview metadata.
- 🧱 **Mod ID validation up front** - Workshop mod IDs are validated before scraping and SteamCMD execution.
- 🚧 **Tighter CSP and preload exposure** - Renderer CSP and preload exposure were tightened.

### Renderer and Download Flow

- 🧩 **Download orchestration refactor** - Rebuilt renderer download orchestration, unifying version-gate logic for both immediate and queued downloads into shared helpers.
- 🗃️ **State management upgrade** - Config and download state are now managed by zustand.
- 🏷️ **Workshop titles in the toolbar** - The detail strip now reuses main-process Workshop metadata to show the resolved mod title once the version check completes.
- 🎨 **Unified icon system** - Emoji UI markers were replaced with Tabler icons for a cleaner desktop look.

### Engineering Quality

- 🧪 **Coverage over full `src`** - Coverage reporting now includes the full `src` with explicit baseline thresholds, honestly reflecting real coverage.
- 🔧 **ESLint flat config** - The legacy ESLint config was migrated to flat config.
- ✅ **New tests** - Added tests for shared URL guarding, config validation (including cross-platform path handling), IPC contracts, SteamCMD helpers, Workshop scraping, ConfigManager, signing configuration, and version-gate decisions.
- 👷 **CI security audits** - CI now includes Dependabot and npm audit checks.
- 🪪 **Windows signing state checks** - Added explicit Windows signing state checks (personal release builds remain unsigned by default).

### Release Verification and Docs

- 🌐 **Multi-target smoke tests** - Added browser-side and native Electron smoke tests.
- 🔄 **Update and real download verification** - Added local update metadata verification and optional real SteamCMD download smoke tests.
- 📚 **Multilingual docs rewrite** - Rewrote English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese public documentation.

### Release Files

| File                                      | Description                                        |
| ----------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `RimWorld-Mod-Downloader-1.3.0-setup.exe` | Windows NSIS installer, recommended for most users |
| `RimWorld-Mod-Downloader-1.3.0.msi`       | Windows MSI installer for standardized deployment  |

### Installation

See [README.md](https://github.com/{{REPOSITORY}}/blob/main/README.md) for installation and setup instructions.

### Known Issues

- ⚠️ Installers are unsigned, so Windows SmartScreen may warn on first run (see SECURITY.md).
- ⚠️ Windows is the only officially packaged platform; Linux and macOS are not yet officially supported.
- 🔄 Updating over an already installed build still requires final manual confirmation; the automated update smoke verifies metadata and assets, not the OS-level install handoff.
- ℹ️ This project is written using **Vibe Coding** and may still contain undiscovered issues — please open an Issue to report them.

### Full Changes

{{COMPARE_SECTION_EN}}

## 中文

### 安全加固

- 🔒 **Webview 挂载校验** - 主进程现在会校验 webview 挂载请求，并阻止跳转到非 Steam 页面
- 🛡️ **共享 URL 白名单** - Steam URL 白名单由渲染进程和主进程共用，避免重复维护
- 🔐 **Token 不再明文返回** - GitHub token 不再以明文返回给渲染进程，前端配置只会收到 token 是否存在和脱敏预览
- 🧱 **模组 ID 校验前置** - Workshop 模组 ID 会在抓取和 SteamCMD 执行下载前校验
- 🚧 **CSP 与 preload 收紧** - 收紧渲染进程的 CSP 并收窄 preload 暴露面

### 前端与下载流程

- 🧩 **下载流程重构** - 重构前端下载编排，统一即时下载与队列下载的版本兼容判断，逻辑集中到共享 version-gate
- 🗃️ **状态管理升级** - 用 zustand 统一管理配置与下载状态
- 🏷️ **工具栏模组标题** - 详情条复用主进程已解析的 Workshop 元数据，版本检查完成后直接显示模组标题
- 🎨 **图标体系统一** - 将界面里的 Emoji 图标替换为 Tabler 图标，视觉风格更接近正式桌面应用

### 工程质量

- 🧪 **覆盖率报告覆盖完整 `src`** - 覆盖率报告现在覆盖完整 `src`，并设置明确的基线阈值，如实反映真实覆盖率
- 🔧 **ESLint flat config** - 将旧版 ESLint 配置迁移到 flat config
- ✅ **新增测试** - 新增共享 URL 校验、配置校验（含跨平台路径处理）、IPC 接口契约、SteamCMD 辅助函数、Workshop 抓取、ConfigManager、签名配置和版本兼容判断测试
- 👷 **CI 安全审计** - CI 现在包含 Dependabot 与 npm audit 检查
- 🪪 **Windows 签名状态检查** - 新增 Windows 签名状态检查（当前个人发布方式默认仍为未签名安装包）

### 发版验证与文档

- 🌐 **多端 smoke test** - 新增浏览器端与原生 Electron smoke test
- 🔄 **更新与真实下载验证** - 新增本地更新元数据验证，以及可选的真实 SteamCMD 下载 smoke test
- 📚 **多语言文档重写** - 重写英文、简体中文、繁体中文公开文档

### 发布文件

| 文件                                      | 说明                               |
| ----------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `RimWorld-Mod-Downloader-1.3.0-setup.exe` | Windows 安装包，推荐大多数用户使用 |
| `RimWorld-Mod-Downloader-1.3.0.msi`       | Windows MSI 安装包，适合标准化部署 |

### 安装说明

详细说明请参考 [README.md](https://github.com/{{REPOSITORY}}/blob/main/README.md)

### 已知问题

- ⚠️ 安装包未代码签名，Windows SmartScreen 首次运行时可能提示风险（详见 SECURITY.md）
- ⚠️ 当前仅正式打包 Windows 平台，Linux 和 macOS 暂未正式支持
- 🔄 对已安装版本的更新安装仍需最终人工确认；自动化更新 smoke 只检查元数据与发布文件，不接管系统层面的安装流程
- ℹ️ 本项目使用 **Vibe Coding** 编写，可能仍存在其他未发现的问题，欢迎提交 Issue 反馈
